name: FIREZ 1500 Electric Fireplace
description: The FIREZ 1500 is our most popular fireplace, offering the perfect balance of size, style and performance. Its impressive widescreen flame display creates a striking centrepiece, making it an ideal choice for modern media walls and open-plan living spaces. Featuring one of the most realistic 3D reflective flame effects available, the FIREZ 1500 delivers the ambience of a real wood-burning fire without the mess, maintenance or inconvenience.
